overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a futuristic neon-lit nightclub. The character moves from an upscale lounge area through a back service corridor and into the main club space featuring a long neon bar and central dance floor with laser lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale lounge with neon bar and velvet seating

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area past the neon bar and purple seating

notable_agents.action: woman in blue crop top walking past the camera
patron in teal shirt sitting on purple couch using a device

entered.detail: long counter with glowing teal and purple neon underlighting
futuristic stools with glowing pink bases
large plush purple sofa against the wall
circular table with pink neon lighting underneath
illuminated sign with stylized text reading L'AMAIN

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic cyberpunk lounge with vibrant neon lighting. The camera moves past a glowing bar counter with purple stools and a velvet couch where a patron sits. A woman in a blue top walks past as the character approaches a stairwell entrance.

events.description: enters narrow back corridor from the main lounge area
lighting dims significantly in the stairwell compared to the neon lounge

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow service corridor and descending a metal staircase

entered.detail: industrial metal stairs with railings leading downward
stainless steel trash can with foot pedal
large illuminated poster featuring a woman's profile with text DYNALAR
gaming cabinet with green neon trim and screens

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the bright lounge into a dimly lit service corridor. They descend a metal staircase past a trash receptacle and a Dynalar advertisement poster, moving toward an arcade machine visible at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: main nightclub bar with extensive neon lighting

events.description: exits corridor back into the main club area with neon bar
bright purple and teal neon lighting returns as entering main club

agents.ego_description: walking along the extensive neon-lit bar with patrons seated on stools

notable_agents.action: patron with white hair sitting at the bar drinking
bartender serving drinks behind the counter

entered.detail: extensive bar counter with continuous purple neon underglow and geometric patterns
reflective wall behind the bar multiplying the neon lights
glowing menu displays above the bar shelves

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens into the main nightclub area featuring a long bar with vibrant purple neon lighting. Patrons sit on glowing stools while bartenders work behind a mirrored wall. The camera moves along the bar toward the dance floor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dance floor with central stage and laser lighting

events.description: moving from the bar area into the open dance floor space
approaching the central stage where dancers are performing

agents.ego_description: approaching the dance floor and circling the central stage where NPCs are dancing

notable_agents.action: dancer performing on the central circular stage
woman with blonde hair dancing near the stage railing

entered.detail: raised circular platform with glowing white neon trim and dancers
elevated booth with equipment and operator visible
purple and blue laser beams cutting through the air above the dance floor
staircase leading to an upper balcony level

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the club's central dance floor with a circular stage illuminated by laser lights. Dancers perform on the raised platform while the camera moves through the crowd. A DJ booth is visible in the background and stairs lead to an upper level, creating a dynamic nightclub atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an upscale cyberpunk lounge through a utilitarian service area and into a sprawling, high-energy nightclub. It begins by gliding past a glowing bar counter with purple stools and a velvet couch, moving through the vibrant lounge as a woman in a blue top crosses the path toward a stairwell. The scene then shifts into a dimly lit service corridor, descending a metal staircase past a trash receptacle and a Dynalar advertisement before approaching an arcade machine at the corridor's end. As the camera emerges from the hallway, the environment opens into the main club space, moving along a long, mirrored bar illuminated by purple neon and bustling bartenders. Finally, the view expands across the central dance floor, passing through a crowd toward a circular stage with laser lights, performing dancers, and a distant DJ booth.
